meaning: [体](头肩先过竿脸朝上的)背越式跳高,福斯贝利式跳高
examples: "It's an absolutely unique image," Fosbury says.
The teaching method of fosbury flop, used in physical education colleges and universities were expounded.
A comparative research between case teaching and traditional teaching on sprint and Fosbury flop by experiment.
Fosbury was about to use a technique for jumping that had never before been used at the Olympics.
By the end of the week, Fosbury had not only won the gold but also set a new Olympic record.
